sys_script_include.description:
This script include loads the icons and text messages for Tasker Widgets. 2.8 - 2022-07-12 - raj - DFCT0010944 - "Tree Zoom Option" tooltips are incorrect on "Template", "Template Task", "Task" forms 2.8 - 2022-07-12 - raj - STRY0117941 - Org Hierarchy- Preset Views buttons- Warning Dialogue for users without Default OU 2.8 - 2022-07-11 - raj - STRY0121782 - Stretch- Template Task Tree Widget UX- Update user's "tree-view" preferences 2.8 - 2022-07-11 - raj - STRY0121780 - Stretch- Task Tree Widget UX- Update user's "tree-view" preferences 2.8 - 2022-07-11 - raj - STRY0125624 - Stretch- Org Tree Widget UX- Update user's "tree-view" preferences
2.8 | 2022-07-04 | raj | STRY0121023 - Org Hierarchy- Favorited OU button- Add Warning Dialogue for users in a different Top OU 2.8 | 2022-06-28 | raj | STRY0121017 - Org Hierarchy- Default OU button- Add Warning Dialogue for users in a different Top OU 2.8 | 2022-06-21 - raj - STRY0116257 - System Setting- Options for limiting available views and setting default "Task Form view" for New Task Forms 2.8 | 2022-06-04 | raj | STRY0121797 - Banner Notification Revamp 2.8 | 2022-06-03 | raj | STRY0123377 - Homepage- Access Points to 'New Dashboards' 2.8 | 2022-06-01 | raj | STRY0121339 - Homepage UI Update- New Design for Colorful Filter and "Show More Filters" dropdown 2.8 | 2022-05-24 | raj | STRY0121807 - Homepage- "My Tasks" Landing Page 2.8 | 2022-05-24 | raj | STRY0121809 - Homepage New Landing Page- "My OU's Tasks" 2.8 | 2022-05-24 | raj | STRY0121811 - Homepage UI Update- Navigation Bar Revamp and add access points for "My Tasks" and "My OU's Tasks"
2.8 | 2022-05-21 | raj | STRY0121811 - Homepage UI Update- Navigation Bar Revamp and add access points for "My Tasks" and "My OU's Tasks" 2.8 | 2022-05-15 | raj | STRY0118963 - Homepage to Org Hierarchy- System remembers user in Bifold/Fullscreen/Table/List 2.8 | 2022-05-09 | raj | STRY0119569 - New Task Form- Form Selector 2.8 | 2022-04-09 | raj | STRY0119818 - Task Tree Widget- New Buttons modify Zoom/Structure preferences - NOTE: also reorganized Template and OU to put all of the repeat 2.8 | 2022-04-20 | raj | STRY0120908 - As any Tasker User, if "Org Hierarchy Fullscreen" is accessible from the "Layout Dropdown", I do NOT want it accessible anywhere else. 2.8 | 2022-04-20 | raj | STRY0120909- Org Hierarchy Fullscreen- Revamp as a Page Layout 2.8 | 2022-04-05 | raj | STRY0117600 - Update Templates to match the UI of Org Hierarchy 2.8 | 2022-03-28 | mmcc | STRY0108687 - DIA - Organizational Hierarchy Visual Indicators- Popover OUHA List- Additional Styling Changes Added Message key 'Tasker - Pending Request' 2.8 | 2022-03-16 | mmcc | STRY0114672 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Any Members List- Update to Popover Panel Added Message key 'Tasker - Show More...' Added Message key 'Tasker - OU Members'; make uppercase with CSS Added Message key 'Tasker - Contacts'; make uppercase with CSS
STRY0117951 - Org Hierarchy- Preset view buttons- New "Vertical and Horizontal" button 2.8 | 2022-03-15 | raj | This will be updated to include the information for all widgets to improve resusability and standardization across all widgets. 2.8 | 2022-03-13 | raj | STRY0117947 - Org Hierarchy Bifold- Revamp- New Navigation Links in Bifold Header 2.8 | 2022-03-13 | raj| STRY0117949 - Org Hierarchy Bifold- Revamp- Tree Widget Header Update 2.8 | 2022-03-10 | mmcc | STRY0114453 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Avatar Control- Popover Panel Added Message key 'Tasker - Open Contact Page' 2.8 | 2022-03-04 | mmcc | STRY0114453 - Org Hierarchy Full Screen- Tree Node- Avatar Control- Popover Panel Added BusinessPhone16, Mail16, Phone16 and SendMessage24 Added Message key 'Tasker - Tasker Message: Organizational Unit: ' Added Message key 'Tasker - Button - Message' 2.8 | 2022-02-19 - raj - DFCT0010796 - Tooltip is incorrect on the Org Hier. "Maximize" and "Minimize " iconsDFCT0010796
sys_script_include.name: TaskerWidgetIconsAndMessages
